name: Cyberse Enchanter
name_jp: サイバース・エンチャンター
desc:
2+ monsters
If you control this card that was Link Summoned using "Cyberse Wizard" as material (Quick Effect): You can target 1 monster your opponent controls; change its battle position, and if you do, negate its effects until the end of the turn. If this card is destroyed by battle, or if this card in its owner's possession is destroyed by an opponent's card effect: You can Special Summon 1 "Cyberse Wizard" from your hand, Deck, or GY. You can only use each effect of "Cyberse Enchanter" once per turn.
mnst_eff:
2+ monsters
If you control this card that was Link Summoned using "Cyberse Wizard" as material (Quick Effect): You can target 1 monster your opponent controls; change its battle position, and if you do, negate its effects until the end of the turn. If this card is destroyed by battle, or if this card in its owner's possession is destroyed by an opponent's card effect: You can Special Summon 1 "Cyberse Wizard" from your hand, Deck, or GY. You can only use each effect of "Cyberse Enchanter" once per turn.

action: Applies effects if Link Summoned using specific Link Material
Activates if destroyed by card effect
mst: Negates the effects of your opponent's Effect Monsters
summoning: Does not require specific Link Materials
